verdicts.reason: The implementation correctly handles all specified auto-fill logic, input validation for the drawer, and mutual exclusion with other drawers, using safe text content for display.

All user-controlled data displayed in the preview drawer uses .textContent, and data assigned to form fields is handled safely. The Content Security Policy is robust given the architectural constraints.
The reply draft feature provides a clear preview of changes, uses safe text content, and ensures proper drawer management.

The reply draft auto-fill feature provides clear, recurring utility by automating a common, tedious task for the target user.
verdicts.evidence: This feature streamlines a frequent workflow (replying to correspondence) by handling error-prone data swaps (From/To), adding necessary references, and clearing irrelevant fields, making it a valuable time-saving tool for naval personnel.

verdicts.reason: The reply draft auto-fill feature directly enhances the core utility of naval-scribe by automating a common, tedious, and error-prone task in formal correspondence with transparent disclosure of changes, reinforcing its identity as a reliable, specialized tool.
